issues.title: Requesting Support/Clarification for Github Apps with Private Keys in GithubSource

labels.name: lifecycle/stale
labels.description: Denotes an issue or PR has remained open with no activity and has become stale.

issues.body:
**Problem**
I am currently seeing that the github webhook events can only be configured using PATs. Which works fine, but I couldn't find any reference or usage that can use Github APP ID, and Private keys to configure webhooks. Adding that support would be super helpful. 

**[Persona:](https://github.com/knative/eventing/blob/master/docs/personas.md)**
Which persona is this feature for?
Event Consumers and System Operators

**Exit Criteria**
A measurable (binary) test that would indicate that the problem has been resolved.
Knative Eventing GithubSource to use secrets containing Github APP ID and Private Keys to connect. 

**Time Estimate (optional):**
How many developer-days do you think this may take to resolve?

**Additional context (optional)**
Add any other context about the feature request here.
